name: supper-helper
description: A chat-first helper agent that mediates between users, workspaces, MCP tools, and Claude Code workers.

scripts.knowledge:init: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js knowledge init
scripts.knowledge:update: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js knowledge update
scripts.test: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && node --test test/*.test.mjs
